evidence.expected: Clear lock screen password prompt when present

steps.name: launch_app
steps.command: hdc -t 3QC0124C11000711 shell aa start -a EntryAbility -b com.huawei.securitytool -m entry

evidence.expected: Clear lock screen password prompt when present

notes: This adapter is the reference implementation inside the business repository.
The structure is designed so core modules can be extracted into a standalone repository later.
Registered pages: dashboard, firewall, firewall-rules, log-manage, peripheral-manage, identity, tool-settings
